narrative:
04Newlexghi (precinct in Perry County) has 875 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
